{"status":"failed","message":"Cannot resolve every D0.5 finding by an in-place core edit because thm:sharp-frontier has statement-level defects owned by the orchestrator/proto, not D0.R. Finding `missing_theorem_assumption`: the theorem statement omits `ass:two-block-homophily` even though the proof and support classification use `m>=2` and `a>b>0`; fixing this requires changing the theorem statement/premises. Finding `ill_typed_frontier_parameterization`: the theorem statement treats `alpha`, `mu_S`, `V_S`, `lambda_S`, and the active cells as fixed-`kappa` objects, but these quantities vary with `r`; correcting this requires restating the frontier parameterization in the theorem statement. Under the hard limit, statement/conclusion edits are discarded on re-solve, so this round must escalate to the orchestrator."}

{"status":"failed","message":"Escalation required for thm:sharp-rho-star. Finding unsupported_specialization is also statement-level: the asserted recovery of the odd-m gap window needs narrowing to the additional low-scale/oddness regime of thm:gap-window, or else a new derivation from this theorem's own hypotheses.
